_comment: Microsoft Fabric MCP server — Copilot CLI format. Auth is sourced from environment variables (NEVER inline). Obtain a Fabric API token with: az account get-access-token --resource https://api.fabric.microsoft.com --query accessToken -o tsv. Set FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN, FABRIC_TENANT_ID, and FABRIC_WORKSPACE_ID before launching the CLI. See labs/lab12.md for the full setup walkthrough and the offline simulator fallback.

fabric.description: Microsoft Fabric MCP — enumerate lakehouses, run notebook cells, and query OneLake from Copilot CLI. Requires FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN + FABRIC_WORKSPACE_ID env vars.

auth.obtain_token_command: az account get-access-token --resource https://api.fabric.microsoft.com --query accessToken -o tsv
auth.warning: NEVER paste the token value into this file. Export it in your shell or load it from Key Vault.
